시편 110:1.content: Yahweh says to my Lord, “Sit at my right hand, until I make your enemies your footstool for your feet.”

시편 110:2.content: Yahweh will send out the rod of your strength out of Zion. Rule among your enemies.

시편 110:3.content: Your people offer themselves willingly in the day of your power, in holy array. Out of the womb of the morning, you have the dew of your youth.

시편 110:4.content: Yahweh has sworn, and will not change his mind: “You are a priest forever in the order of Melchizedek.”

시편 110:5.content: The Lord is at your right hand. He will crush kings in the day of his wrath.

시편 110:6.content: He will judge among the nations. He will heap up dead bodies. He will crush the ruler of the whole earth.

시편 110:7.content: He will drink of the brook on the way; therefore he will lift up his head.
